untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of a specific 5-candle candlestick pattern (Bearish Breakaway) with precise morphological characteristics (tall 1st and 5th candles, three smaller middle candles, middle candle color flexibility, downward breakout). This requires multi-candle pattern recognition logic not expressible through simple indicator comparisons. The allowed indicators cannot capture: (1) pattern shape across 5 specific candles, (2) relative candle heights and body sizes in sequence, (3) wick proportions, or (4) the specific downward breakout confirmation. A candlestick pattern detector would need to be added as a custom indicator.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using uptrend regime, relative body size vs ATR, and range compression to approximate pattern conditions, but this is insufficient. Entry conditions based on: uptrend context, large body (approximating tall candles), and small range (approximating middle candle compression). Exit uses 20-SMA crossover as standard trend reversal. Original source text provided no performance statistics or exit guidance (marked AUTHOR_SILENT), so defaults were applied.
